description: Uploader track. Require each uploader connection to declare exactly one radar device type, rd03d or ld2451, plus test_mode metadata. Add a --radar-device CLI option required for real and --test-mode runs; fake uploader must emulate the selected real device type, not a separate fake device. Implement the fixed channel contract: after joining radar:config, send register_device with {device_type, test_mode}; then call get_config. Treat device_not_registered or device_already_connected replies as clear reconnect/log errors.
title: Add uploader radar device handshake
